I hate these comparisons because it's not apples to apples.The entire point of AWS is so you don't have to get a dedicated server.It's infra as a service.

I don’t understand your complaint.The point of having a private chef is so you don’t have to cook food by yourself.It’s still extremely useful to know if the private chef is cheaper or more expensive than cooking by yourself and by how much, so you can make a decision more aware of the trade offs involved.
